tasks.subject: Update session.Interceptor interface
tasks.description: Change `session/event.go` to replace `Interceptor` interface returning `(Event, bool, error)` with returning `(InterceptResult, error)`. `InterceptResult` contains `Event` and `Feedback []artifact.Text`. Update `InterceptorFunc` to match.

metadata.note: Interface updated, but stream.go needs Task 4 for compilation

tasks.subject: Add loop.FeedbackEvent
tasks.description: Add `FeedbackEvent` struct to `loop/loop.go` with `Content string` and `Ctx context.Context`. Implement `Kind()`, `Context()`, and `MarshalJSON`. Ensure `EventBus.Emit` does NOT append `FeedbackEvent` to state.

tasks.subject: Update x/slash handler signature and parsing
tasks.description: Change `Handler` signature to `func(ctx context.Context, cmd Command) (Result, error)`. Add `Command` and `Result` structs. Add `Fields` helper. Update `Intercept` to use raw `Input` and return `session.InterceptResult`.
tasks.activeForm: Updating x/slash handler signature and parsing

tasks.subject: Wire feedback into session.Stream.processOne
tasks.description: Update `Stream.processOne` in `session/stream.go` to handle new `Interceptor` interface. Check `result.Event == nil` for consumption. Emit `loop.FeedbackEvent` for each feedback item.

tasks.subject: Auto-register /help and unknown-command fallback
tasks.description: Update `slash.Bind` to accept `description`. Auto-register `/help` in `NewRegistry()`. Implement unknown-command fallback with feedback message.

tasks.subject: Update TUI to render feedback events
tasks.description: Add `feedbackMsg` Bubble Tea message type. Handle `loop.FeedbackEvent` in TUI subscription. Render as system-styled message in conversation. Add 'feedback' to subscription kinds.
tasks.activeForm: Updating TUI to render feedback events

tasks.subject: Update HTTP conduit to serialize feedback events
tasks.description: Add `feedbackEventJSON` struct. Update `MarshalOutputEvent` and `UnmarshalOutputEvent`. Add 'feedback' to default event kinds.
tasks.activeForm: Updating HTTP conduit to serialize feedback events

tasks.subject: Update existing callers and tests
tasks.description: Update `examples/http-chat/main.go`, `x/slash/slash_test.go`, `session/stream_test.go`, and other test files to use new interfaces.

tasks.subject: Add feedback emission integration test in session/stream_test.go
tasks.description: Add a test that verifies loop.FeedbackEvent is emitted when an interceptor returns Feedback items. Wire a custom Interceptor that returns multiple artifact.Text feedback items, subscribe to 'feedback' kind, and assert receipt of corresponding FeedbackEvents with correct content and context.

tasks.subject: Add TUI feedbackMsg handling test
tasks.description: Add a unit test in x/conduit/tui/model_test.go that sends a feedbackMsg to the model via Update and asserts: a new renderedTurn with RoleSystem is appended, the block has kind 'feedback' with the correct content, and the pending flag is unchanged.

tasks.subject: Add FeedbackEvent JSON marshal/unmarshal tests
tasks.description: Add tests in loop/loop_test.go for FeedbackEvent MarshalJSON, and in x/conduit/http/types_test.go for MarshalOutputEvent/UnmarshalOutputEvent with FeedbackEvent. Verify round-trip correctness including content and context fields.

tasks.subject: Add slash parsing edge case tests
tasks.description: Add tests in x/slash/slash_test.go for leading whitespace before slash commands, and multiple feedback items from a single interceptor. Also test that an interceptor returning only feedback (nil Event) consumes the original event without triggering a turn.

tasks.subject: Add missing doc comments identified by documentation review
tasks.description: Add field comment for UserMessageEvent.Content, clarify InterceptResult.Feedback purpose, add package-level comment to x/conduit/tui/model.go, and add brief comment to examples/http-chat/main.go run function.

tasks.subject: Fix post-slash whitespace parsing in x/slash/slash.go
tasks.description: Fix the slash command parsing to skip leading spaces after the `/` character, so `/   help` is treated the same as `/help`. Add test for this behavior.

tasks.subject: Add feedback provenance and multi-feedback+replace tests in session/stream_test.go
tasks.description: Add TestStream_Interceptor_FeedbackProvenance (verifies FeedbackEvent.Ctx carries the original UserMessageEvent provenance) and TestStream_Interceptor_FeedbackWithReplaceAndMultipleFeedback (verifies both feedback and replacement work together).

tasks.subject: Add all remaining slash tests to x/slash/slash_test.go
tasks.description: Add tests for: duplicate bind overwrite, mixed-case unknown command, empty feedback not emitted, Fields whitespace handling, registry isolation.

tasks.subject: Add empty context omission tests to loop/loop_test.go
tasks.description: Add tests verifying that TurnCompleteEvent, ErrorEvent, and LifecycleEvent omit the 'context' field from JSON when Ctx is empty/nil.

tasks.subject: Add malformed JSON tests to x/conduit/http/types_test.go
tasks.description: Add tests for UnmarshalOutputEvent with malformed JSON and invalid kind type.
